title: AppState.data_dir is String; should be PathBuf
description: AppState (server.rs) stores data_dir as String. At every use site this String is immediately wrapped in Path::new(&state.data_dir) (webhook.rs line 92, server.rs line 85). Storing it as PathBuf would remove these conversions and make the type express its semantic correctly. The same applies to ServerConfig.data_dir, ServerConfig.bind, ServerConfig.domain, WatchConfig.path, WatchConfig.published — these are all path or domain fields stored as String forcing callers to convert. Per standards: use newtypes instead of primitive obsession; PathBuf for paths, and at minimum not String for fields that will always be used as Path.
close_reason: Accepted: ponytail comment. Not worth the churn.
